name: xkcd-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.2 xkcd server — official JSON API + explainxkcd search; Prefab UI rich in-chat comics.

tools.name: xkcd_latest
tools.description: Fetch the most recent xkcd comic with rich Prefab UI rendering.

tools.name: xkcd_get
tools.description: Fetch a specific xkcd comic by its index number.

tools.name: xkcd_random
tools.description: Fetch a random xkcd comic from the archive.

tools.name: xkcd_search
tools.description: Search xkcd comics by topic using explainxkcd semantic indexing.

tools.name: xkcd_help
tools.description: Interactive usage guide and system configuration help card.
